required_capture_fields: candidate_local_id; discovery_surface_type; public_url_or_local_path; retrieval_date_utc; language; jurisdiction; actor_type; edge_case_theme; claim_stub; corroboration_target_family; translation_status; private_or_sensitive_risk; terms_or_rights_note; notes
exclusion_rules: Reject private messages, credentials, closed-group content, doxxing, harassment material, anonymous screenshot-only claims without source path, and rows that cannot name a plausible public corroboration route.
promotion_trigger: Promote only when one public corroborating source in sf07, sf08, sf09, sf10, sf11, sf12, or sf13 is captured and the lead remains scientifically relevant after duplicate screening.
publication_safe_use_now: Lead-queue or methods-only mention; never count as seeded evidence or shared-claim support before corroboration.
reviewer_risk_prevented: Prevents LIMEN from treating noisy social/web discovery surfaces as evidence-grade incidents or from storing unsafe/private material.
visualization_dashboard_hook: Lead queue; corroboration backlog; source-upgrade funnel; Figure 1 planned-frontier tooltip
paper_or_thesis_use: Methods section on frontier intake discipline; limitations paragraph on unseeded discovery families; thesis note on observability boundaries
next_smallest_publishability_move: Materialize a small empty lead ledger template using these fields only if a clearly bounded public lead family is opened later; otherwise keep sf14 at schema-only status.
